_comment: Trigger-eval cases for skills/recognize-pose-or-gesture/SKILL.md. Each case has a prompt and a reason explaining the expected routing decision.

should_fire.prompt: Detect when workers are bending incorrectly at the assembly station
should_fire.reason: Bending detection is listed explicitly in TRIGGER ('is the worker bending', 'bend detection') — keypoint-based body pose analysis

should_fire.prompt: Recognize hand gestures to control my smart home system
should_fire.reason: Gesture recognition is a primary TRIGGER keyword — routes here, not classify-or-flag

should_fire.prompt: Alert me if someone falls in the elderly care facility footage
should_fire.reason: 'falls in footage' is in TRIGGER clause — fall detection is a named capability

should_fire.prompt: Analyze worker posture for ergonomics compliance
should_fire.reason: 'posture' and 'ergonomics' both appear in TRIGGER — joint-angle ergonomics analysis

should_fire.prompt: Detect whether someone is raising their hand in classroom video
should_fire.reason: 'raising hand' / 'raise their hand' in TRIGGER — hand-raise gesture classification from keypoints

should_fire.prompt: I want to build a sign language recognition system from webcam footage
should_fire.reason: 'sign language' is explicitly listed in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Check if gym members are performing squats with correct form
should_fire.reason: 'squat' is in TRIGGER ('squat detection', 'squat form') — rule-based squat angle classifier on YOLO-pose keypoints

should_fire.prompt: Track the skeleton and joint angles of patients doing physical therapy exercises
should_fire.reason: 'skeleton' and 'joint angles' / 'joint angle' both appear in TRIGGER — full COCO body skeleton + ergonomics angle computation

should_not_fire.prompt: Classify whether a worker is wearing a hard hat on the construction site
should_not_fire.reason: Image-level PPE classification without keypoints — 'wearing' + 'hard hat' → classify-or-flag (in SKIP: 'detecting whether a person is wearing PPE or hard hat')

should_not_fire.prompt: Measure the exact body contour area in these medical images
should_not_fire.reason: Pixel-precise body contour area requires segmentation masks — 'contour' maps to SKIP ('pixel-precise segmentation or body contour area measurement → segment-and-analyze')

should_not_fire.prompt: Track each person's path through the store and count how long they stay in each aisle
should_not_fire.reason: Identity path tracking across frames without pose analysis — 'path tracking' maps to SKIP ('identity tracking or path tracking across frames → track-and-count')

should_not_fire.prompt: Read the text on the safety sign above the exit door
should_not_fire.reason: Text extraction — 'text' and 'safety sign reading' both in SKIP clause ('text or label extraction from images, e.g. safety sign reading → read-text')

should_not_fire.prompt: How much does it cost to run pose detection on 5 cameras 24/7?
should_not_fire.reason: Cost/scale question with no unsolved pose problem — 'cost' maps to SKIP ('cost, scale, or self-hosting vs managed deployment question → deployment-consultant')

should_not_fire.prompt: I already have a trained pose model. How do I integrate it into my Python app?
should_not_fire.reason: User already has a working model and asks only about integration — explicitly in SKIP ('already has a working pose model and asks only about export, optimization, active learning, or integration')

should_not_fire.prompt: Set up active learning for my existing keypoint detection model
should_not_fire.reason: Active learning on an existing model — 'active learning' is in SKIP ('user already has a working pose model and asks only about export, optimization, active learning, or integration')

should_not_fire.prompt: Compare cloud-hosted vs self-hosted deployment for my fall detection system
should_not_fire.reason: Self-hosting vs managed deployment comparison — 'self-hosting vs managed deployment' is in SKIP ('cost, scale, or self-hosting vs managed deployment question → deployment-consultant')
